delta_summary_rule: Later pressure deltas must be derived only from registered crucible results with canonical runner precedence and baseline-comparable kernel targets.
epoch_coverage_rule: Pressure coverage must remain finite and explicit across the ratified levels. Unbound or unregistered pressures remain lab-only and cannot count toward later promotion or routing claims.
promotion_eligibility_rule: Pressure classes become admissible for later adapter promotion only through replayable crucible receipts and not through narrative or unbound benchmark claims.
